title: Differentiation I — From Gradients to the Power Rule
description: What the derivative means as a gradient and a rate of change, how to differentiate from first principles, and how to apply the power rule to polynomials.
objectives: Interpret the derivative as the gradient of a tangent and as a rate of change
Estimate a gradient using the gradient of a chord
Differentiate simple polynomials from first principles using the limit definition
Apply the power rule to differentiate terms of the form ax^n
Evaluate a derivative at a point and find the gradient of a curve there
